description:
State-of-the-art image generation with top-of-the-line prompt following, visual quality, image detail and output diversity. This is the most powerful version of FLUX 1.1. 

Optional parameters:
Set aspect ratio. Select from (16:9, 4:3, 1:1, 3:4, 9:16). It is set to 1:1 aspect ratio as default.

Notes:
Send an image (jpeg/png/webp/heic/heif) to have this model reimagine/regenerate it via FLUX Redux.
